Add juice. I usually use orange juice or the orange/peach/mango flavored variety. Or I look in the Mexican food aisle and buy Guava and Peach nectar for a different kick.  I like this a lot better than those smoothies with milk or ice cream and think it's healthier too!
After blending and if it's too clumpy and thick add 2 or 3 more splashes of juice and blend some more till the consistency you want.
Enjoy!

Chop in quarters and throw in a blender.
Wash raspberries and add to the blender.
Add 2tbsps orange juice (water works too but it needs something to thin it out a bit) and blend until smooth.

name: Good Morning Fruit Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender.
Add 1 - 2 cups ice cubes.
Blend till smooth!

name: 3 Berry Tofu Smoothie
directions: Blend all ingredients together!
Drink.

name: Orange Mango Smoothie
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender and blend until smooth.
Serve immediately or store in the refrigerator.

name: Coconut Milk Smoothie
directions: In a blender, puree the blueberries, bananas, yogurt, coconut milk, and honey.
Serve.

name: Banana Strawberry  Yogurt Smoothie
directions: Put ingredients in a blender and process to smooth.
Drink and enjoy.

name: Mango Strawberry Razzmatazz Smoothie
directions: Place everything in the blender and blend until smooth.

name: Blue Monkey Smoothie
directions: Add all ingredients except ice cubes to blender (or tall beaker, if using immersion blender).
Blend until smooth.
Add ice cubes until desired consistency is reached.

name: Mango Banana Smoothie
directions: Blend all ingredients until smooth, slowly add in ice to keep icy and cold.

name: Lemon Berry Crush Smoothie
directions: Place milk, Crystal Light, yogurt, blueberries and ice cubes in blender container; cover.
Blend on high speed until smooth; serve immediately.

name: North Pole Strawberry Smoothie
directions: Place strawberries and water in blender.
Cover and blend on medium-high speed until slushy.
Blend on medium speed until smooth.
Transfer to 2-cup container.
Wash and dry blender. Place frozen yogurt and reduced-fat yogurt in blender.
Cover and blend on medium speed on medium speed until smooth.
Place crushed candy on small plate.
Pipe decorating gel around rim of 2 12oz. glasses.
Dip rims into crushed candy.
Carefully pour yogurt mixture and strawberries at the same time into glasses, creating a half-and-half design.
Serve with large drinking straws, if desired.

name: Raspberry Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender.
Cover and blend at high speed until smooth.

name: Berry Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients except ice in blender.
Blend on high for 2 minutes or until smooth.
Gradually add ice cubes; blend on high until smooth.

name: Thick Coffee Banana Smoothie
directions: Twenty to thirty minutes before you plan to mix your smoothie, put the coffee in a shallow pan and place it in the freezer, stirring once or twice after 15 minutes.
It should become slushy-icy.
Thinly slice the banana onto a plate and put that in the freezer as well, to chill.
While you're waiting, chill the glasses you plan to use.
When you're ready to proceed, combine the chilled coffee, banana, and sugar to taste in a blender.
Blend just until smooth.
Add the yogurt and  any of the remaining ingredients you wish to use.
Blend again, briefly, just until smooth. Taste, adding a little more sugar if needed. Transfer to the chilled glasses and serve.

name: Orange Berry Smoothie
directions: Put everything in the blender and blend until smooth.  You may have to add a little more milk to make it blend if it's too thick.
Makes 2 larger or 4 small servings.

similar.name: Strawberry Orange Smoothie With a Twist

name: Grapefruit Mango Splash Smoothie
directions: Peel grapefruit.
Add to blender with other ingredients.
Blend.
Enjoy.

name: Blueberry Orange Banana Smoothie
directions: Add all ingredients to blender.
Blend until smooth. (Might take a bit longer because of the orange).

name: Thick Strawberry Smoothie
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender.
Blend until desired thickness.
Enjoy!

name: Peanut Berry Smoothie
directions: Put all ingredients into a blender or food processor.
Process until smooth.
Pour into glass.
Enjoy!

name: Raspberry - Mango Smoothie
directions: Toss the mango, berries and lemonade in the blender; whirl on medium speed, push fruit down, add sugar or honey; whirl again and add half the milk.
Whirl on high and add remaining milk, yogurt and vanilla; whirl until smooth and free-flowing.
Serve in stemmed glasses.
NOTE:   I used frozen for my recipe, but you could use fresh just as easily.   Frozen lends that ICE COLD quality and WITHOUT ice cubes!

name: Frozen Banana Smoothie
directions: Put all ingredients into the blender.
Process on medium-high speed until smooth.
Top with whipped cream and an additional dash of nutmeg if desired.

name: Banana Shake / Smoothie
directions: Place the banana, orange juice, honey and milk in a food processor and process until smooth.
Pour over ice into 2 tall glasses and sprinkle with cinnamon.

name: Chocolate Banana Breakfast Drink
directions: Put all ingredients in the blender and blend until smooth.
The ice is for a thicker drink.

name: Soy Protein Powder Smoothie
directions: Combine in blender and process until creamy and smooth.

name: Banana Smoothie
directions: Peel bananas, and chop into about 5 pieces. In a blender, blend the bananas, the milk and ice-cream. After all blended, add honey and mix again. Serve in tall glasses and enjoy!

name: Banana Peanut Butter Smoothie
directions: Pop everything in the blender and blend away!
Bottoms up.

name: Blue and Red Berry Smoothie
directions: Blend till smooth. Enjoy with a straw.

similar.name: Red White and Blue Smoothie Parfait

name: Berry Yummy Smoothie Shake
directions: add the yogurt, fruit, juice, ice, and splenda into the blender (in this order helps the blender blade puree easier).
blend until free of fruit or ice chunks.
enjoy!

name: Frozen Banana Mango Smoothie

In a blender, combine all ingredients and blend until smooth.

name: Strawberry Lemon Smoothie
directions: Pour all liquid ingredients into smoothie maker or blender.
Add all frozen ingredients.
Blend at low setting for 30 seconds then at high setting until smooth.
Serve immediately.

name: Berry Blast Smoothie
directions: Pour all liquid ingredients into smoothie maker or blender.
Add all the frozen ingredients.
Blend at low setting for 30 seconds then high setting until smooth.
Serve immediately.

name: Orange Banana Cream Smoothie

Add all frozen ingredients.
Blend at low setting for 30 seconds then high setting until smooth.
Serve immediately.

name: Strawberry-Banana Soy Smoothie
directions: Add all ingredients to a blender, blending after each addition.
Pour and enjoy!
Hint: You might want to defrost any frozen ingredients prior to adding them to the blender.
Alternative to Silken Tofu: 1/2 cup regular tofu, with 1/2 cup liquid (water, milk, or soy milk) pre-processed in the blender works fine.

similar.name: Super Healthy and Delicious Strawberry Banana Soy Smoothie

name: Frozen Strawberry Smoothie

Mix on medium-low (or recommended setting for crushing ice), until strawberries are fully crushed and mixture is smoothly blended.
Serve, topped with whipped cream is desired.
Adults may enjoy this with a shot of rum blended inches.

name: Banana Smoothie
directions: Put banana slices, milk, ice cream, and ice cubes into the blender.
Put on cover and hit puree for one minute.
Pour into a tall glass and serve.

name: Refreshing Peach Smoothie
directions: Pour all liquid ingredients into the smoothie maker or blender then add all the frozen ingredients.
Blend at the low setting for 30 seconds then at high until smooth.

name: Healthy Frozen Fruit Smoothies

Blend well until there are no chunks

name: Raspberry Sunrise Smoothie

Blend at low setting for 30 seconds then at high until smooth.
Serve immediately.

name: Strawberry Banana Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in blender; cover. Blend until smooth.

Serve immediately.

name: Pineapple, Apple & Banana Smoothie

Serve immediately.

Crush with mallet or rolling pin.

name: Creamy Raspberry Smoothie
directions: Pour all liquid ingredients in the smoothie maker or blender then add all the frozen ingredients.

Serve immediately.

name: Chocolate Strawberry Banana Smoothie
directions: Blend in a blender.  Enjoy!

name: Orange, Apple & Banana Smoothie

Serve.

name: Tropical Paradise Smoothie

name: Strawberry Lemonade Smoothie

name: Sunburst Smoothie

Eat immediately or put in the freezer for up to 1/2 hour to get extra freezy.

name: Blueberry & Orange Smoothie

name: Banana Custard Smoothie
directions: Blend all ingredients until smooth.

name: Tropical Fruity Smoothies

name: Peach-Berry Smoothie

name: Peach Strawberry Smoothie
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender and blend until smooth.

name: Kiwi Strawberry Smoothie

name: Strawberry Peach Banana Smoothie

name: Orange Julius
directions: In a blender mix all ingredients above and mix until ice is puréed.
Pour into cups.
Enjoy!

name: Banana Split Smoothie

Add cocoa and then fruit. Put cover on and blend until smooth.

name: Blueberry Smoothie
directions: This is super easy. Just toss everything into a blender, switch to the highest setting, and let fly until you stop hearing ice cubes crunching and everything is fairly smooth.

There are an infinite number of variations on this using different combinations of fruit and jam. You might also consider adding protein powder, ground flax seed, or any other supplement that strikes your.
fancy. It's best to wait until near the end, and just blend long enough to mix the protein powder of whatever inches You can also substitute apple juice for the soymilk to create a tangier concotion.

name: Blueberry Frosty
directions: Put all ingredients into the blender - I usually break up the banana into chunks.
Pulse and blend until smooth.
Enjoy!

name: Strawberry-Banana Smoothie
directions: In a blender, process until smooth ripe banana, strawberries, fat-free milk, low-fat plain yogurt, honey, and 1 or 2 ice cubes.
Serve.

name: Blackberry and Banana Smoothie
directions: In a blender combine all the above ingredients.

name: Tropical Dream Smoothie
directions: Put all ingredients into blender.
Blend until smooth.
Serve.

name: Mango and Banana Smoothie

name: Tropical Smoothie

Serve immediately.

name: Berry Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender and blend until smooth.

name: Strawberry Tofu Smoothies
directions: In a blender, combine all ingredients; cover and process for 45-60 seconds or until smooth.

name: Yummy Yogurt Smoothie
directions: PLACE milk, yogurt and Carnation Instant Breakfast in blender; cover. Blend until smooth. For a frostier smoothie, add ice. Blend until crushed.
For a no-sugar added version, substitute No Sugar Added Vanilla CrÃ¨me NESTLÉ CARNATION INSTANT BREAKFAST and artificially-sweetened yogurt.

name: Blueberry Smoothies
directions: In blender, place blueberries, soymilk and yogurt. Cover; blend on high speed about 1 minute or until smooth. Sweeten to taste with honey.
Pour into 2 glasses. Serve immediately.

name: Strawberry Smoothie

With blender running, add berries a few at a time, through opening in lid.

name: Blueberry Banana Smoothie
directions: Blend all ingredients till smooth.

name: Tropical Smoothie (No Added Sugar)
directions: Throw everything in the blender. 1 -- 37 -- 82 -- HIKE!
Blend for about 2 minutes or until creamy and well mixed.
Pour into two lovely cups and enjoy.:).
NOTES: These are even better chilled in the fridge. TIme to make does not including chilling or freezing fruit.

name: Mango Strawberry Smoothie
directions: In a blender, combine all ingredients and whiz until mixture is smooth and frothy.
Enjoy!

similar.name: Dairy Free Strawberry, Banana and Mango Smoothie

name: My Breakfast Strawberry "smoothie"
directions: Place the first 4 ingredients into the blender and pulse several times.
Add the strawberries and let the blender run for about 30 seconds.
Pour in a cup (I put mine in the freezer for about 30 minutes to keep the drink frosty longer) and sit back to drink a glass of strawberry Heaven!

name: Healthy Strawberry Banana Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in blender in order listed and blend to desired consistency.
Tip: If you mash ripe bananas and put in an ice cube tray to freeze, you'll have easy access to frozen bananas.  After freezing, place cubes in a freezer bag.  Use 4-5 cubes for 1/2 a frozen banana.

name: Low Fat Strawberry Smoothie
directions: Place yogurt and strawberries in covered blender container and puree on high.
Add the ice cubes. Once the ice cubes have been pulverized mixture should be almost "too" thick add the Agave Syrup and vanilla.
Blend for another 15 seconds or so.

name: Kahlua, Pineapple, Apple, Banana Smoothie
directions: Add all ingredients to blender except for the pecans and sweetened whipped cream.
I like to add all the liquid ingredients first and then the frozen on top; I find that it blends together easier.
For even a thicker smoothie, add more ice.
Divide among glasses.
Top each serving with toasted pecans and sweetened whipped cream, if using.

name: Creamy Peach Smoothie
directions: Place ingredients in blender or food processor and process on high until smooth.

name: Pineapple Mango Smoothie
directions: Blend first 4 ingredients together then add pineapple and mango.

name: Pomegranate Passion Smoothie
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender, and puree on high until smooth.

name: Chocolate, Raspberry and Banana Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in blender container; cover.

name: Peach & Banana Smoothie
directions: Place ingredients in a blender and blend together until smooth.

name: Tropical Fruit Smoothie...mmm
directions: Chill can of coconut milk in the fridge.
Open can of pineapple and place two to three chunks of pineapple into each square of ice cube tray, pour remaining juice into tray over the chunks. Freeze until solid.
Peel mango and chop into pineapple chunk sized cubes and freeze in a ziplock bag or plastic freezer container.
Once fruits are frozen, pulse in food processor or blender until you have small, fine bits. I use six pineapple cubes and 1/4 of the mango per serving.
Add coconut milk until desired consistency and add brown sugar.
Leave leftover fruits in freezer for next time and leave coconut milk in a sealed jar in the fridge for future use.
I have also added one frozen banana to the mix and/or a handful of frozen strawberries.

name: Banana - Date Smoothie
directions: Place everything in blender and blend until the ice cubes are well incorperated.
Serve in two chilled glasses.
How easy is that :).

name: Lemon Strawberry Smoothie

Add the rest of the ingredients and blend or process until the mixture is smooth.

Add 2 tablespoons of sugar; I prefer to add the sugar while while the blender is still going (through the removable cap on the lid).

name: Healthy Low Cal Smoothie
directions: Mix in blender and enjoy!

name: Banana Coconut Smoothie
directions: Peel banana and cut into large chunks. (You can put the frozen banana under hot water to make it easier to peel).
Add yogurt, milk, coconut milk, banana, honey, and lime juice to blender. Blend until smooth.
Add more milk to make it thinner, ice to make it thicker.

name: Nutty Blueberry Smoothie

name: Strawberry Smoothie

name: Summer Fruity Smoothies
directions: Place ingredients in a blender and puree until smooth.

name: Strawberry Yogurt Smoothie

you may add 2 ice cubes to make it thicker.
you may use any other fruit you wish.

add protein powder and oat flour. Can use a meal replacment powder like myoplex or metrx instead. blend on medium for 15 seconds.
add peanut butter and blend for 30 seconds.
add ice and blend on high for 30 seconds on high.
pour in tall glass and serve.

name: Cheese and Fruit Smoothie

Place the ice, juice, mango flesh and scoop the frozen yoghurt into a blender or the bowl of a food processer.
Blend until fairly smooth and there are no chunks of ice.

name: Alcohol Free Pina Colada Smoothie

Pour into 2 quart pitcher.
Place remaining stgrawberries, powdered sugar, and lime juice in blender or food processor.

A Vitamix or other high-powered blender is best for this recipe.
notes:

serving sizes: originally, this was sized as one very large serving for someone following a whole foods, plant-based diet similar to dr. joel fuhrman's "eat to live" high-volume produce protocol. for those following such a diet-style, you may (like me, and i am a small woman weighing --90lbs) like to make this big "green" smoothie and sip it all morning. the big kicker for caloric content is how much flax you put in -- otherwise, these are mostly nutrient-dense (vs. calorically dense) foods (the soymilk and the banana being higher in calories, relatively, of course). i have since adjusted this for 2-3 servings, since most people would only want one glass for a light breakfast.

substitutions: feel free to make substitutions here. collards stand in nicely for kale, pineapple can be subbed for part of the berries and stands up nicely against the assertive cruciferous greens, raspberries and mango and anything else available work well. my basic formula is banana (creaminess, flavor), greens (mostly for the nutrients), 1-2 kinds of fruit (lower glycemic index than bananas but lots of flavor and nutrients), 1-2T flax (depends on the number of servings, and what else you're eating that day), soymilk (or ricemilk, or nutmilk, or juice -- although nondairy milk will make it creamier and add different nutrient values than extracted fruit juice), and then enough water to blend or ice to chill.

handling greens for smoothies: i take my greens, wash them, and then freeze them (raw) into 3c servings for making smoothies. when i make the smoothie, i simply throw the frozen (uncooked) greens into the smoothie and they blend up especially well. i hear from folks without a blender like vitamix or blendtec that this gets their greens smoother.

blenders: if you do NOT have a high-powered blender, try flaxseed meal instead of the whole seeds. the oil won't give the same benefit as the meal/seeds, and the whole seeds won't be digested and assimilated if they're not broken up properly prior to consumption (although the oil is better than nothing).

a final caveat: i can't stand this with cooked frozen greens. i know people who do this, but i find the end result slimy and unpalatable, so i only use raw (albeit sometimes frozen first) greens in my smoothies, and eat my cooked greens elsewhere.

name: Banana Honey Blueberry Smoothie With Added Fibre
directions: Add broken up banana, blueberries and cup of milk to your mixer/blender.

Blend very well, the mixture will go a nice lavendar colour. Add some Benefibe or your choice of fibre powder, and honey; the honey I used was "raw" or unprocessed honey straight from a local apiarist/bee keeper, and is not runny like shop bought liquid honey and has a nicer, less syrupy flavour, almost creamy in nature. Blend again very well, ensuring the honey has fully dispersed through the mix.

As there is banana involved, the smoothie will start going slighty darker, or brownish if not consumed right away, so is best if you only make what you are going to drink immediately, or it wont look as appetising later.
I shared some with my little boy, what better way to get some fibre into your kids?

name: Cherry Vanilla Smoothie
directions: Put first three ingredients in a blender or smoothie maker.
Puree until smooth.
Add the ice cubes, and puree until smooth again.

name: Heavy on the Strawberries Smoothie
directions: In blender, combine cranberry juice, yogurt, and strawberries and blend until mixture is smooth and frothy. Pour into 1 tall glass.

name: Fruit Smoothie
directions: Combine all ingredients in blender.  Blend until mixed completely.

name: Strawberry Banana Smoothie
directions: Combine all ingredients in blender and set to smoothie or medium high setting until blended (add extra ice to desired consistency).

name: Blueberry Yogurt Smoothie
directions: Place yogurt, fruit, splash of milk, handful of ice, honey (to taste), and sugar all into a blender. Blend until smooth. Taste it for sweetness and add more honey if needed.

name: Pink Oaty Smoothie
directions: Soak the oats in the soymilk for at least 15 minutes to soften.
Blend all until smooth (stand blender, food processor or immersion blender will work).

similar.name: Healthy Strawberry, Orange, Banana, Soymilk Smoothie

name: Banana and Chocolate Shake
directions: Put Sustagen Dutch chocolate powder, milk, banana and ice cubes in a blender and blend until smooth.
Transfer to a jug or divide between 2 large glasses to serve.

name: Smoothie
directions: Mix all ingredients in a blender or with an immersion blender.

name: Very Berry Protein Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in blender. Blend until smooth. Pour into a tall glass and enjoy! Use frozen fruit for an even frostier effect.

name: Peanut Butter and Banana Smoothie
directions: Place everything in blender and mix.

name: Big Berry Smoothie
directions: Add all the ingredients to a blender and pulse until smooth.

name: Banana Split Smoothie
directions: In a blender, combine the first five ingredients; cover and process until smooth.
Gradually add ice, blending until slushy.
Pour into chilled glasses.

name: Chocolate Banana Smoothie.
directions: put chocolate milk and banana in blender, blend until smooth.
serve.

name: Bluenana Smoothie
directions: Peel the banana, break into 3 or 4 pieces, and place in a blender.  Add blueberries, lime juice, sugar, milk and crushed ice.
Blend until smooth and creamy.

name: Strawberry Smoothies
directions: First put your strawberrys in the blender. (1 cup of strawberrys per serving).
Second you put your milk inches You can use any type of milk, even soy.
Third put the sugar in if you wish.
Fourth put the chocolate inches.
Put ice in too.
You ease your setting untill its all the way high. (30 sec per setting).
Serve.

name: Apricot and Strawberry Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender and puree until frothy.

name: Magic Bullet Strawberry/Banana Smoothie
directions: Throw all the ingredients into the large bullet container (adding the ice last, so it's the closest to the blade) then blend.
I shake the magic bullet while the smoothie is going to make sure i crush all the ice.
I usually just put that top on it and take it to work with me.

similar.name: Quick ‘n Easy Strawberry and Banana Smoothie

name: Strawberry and Orange Smoothie
directions: In a blender or food processor, combine the ingredients & process until smooth.
Pour into two tall glasses & ENJOY!

similar.name: Strawberry Orange Smoothie With a Twist

name: Protein Shake
directions: Put everything in the blender and puree.
Drink.

name: Berry Smooth Shake Smoothie
directions: Put berries and milk in the blender.  Blend on medium for about 1 minute to get the berries really blended into the milk.
Add yoghurt, honey, banana and vanilla.  Blend at medium until well mixed, roughly 30 seconds.
Add in ice cubes.  Pulse a few times or start on low, then go to medium to get the ice cubes chopped up and well distributed through the smoothie.

name: Perfect Strawberry Milkshake
directions: Combine Ice cream, Milk and strawberries in a blender. Blend for 10 seconds, or until smooth. Serve immediately.

name: Healthy Strawberry-Banana Breakfast Smoothie
directions: Make a cup of hot water and add in two packets tea. Any tea will good but I prefer Chai tea. Wait until cool.
Add tea, cinnamon, stevia and soy milk to blender. Add as much cinnamon and stevia to taste.
Add in 1 - 6oz container of yogurt, I used blueberry.
Measure out two cups of strawberries, add to blender. Also add chopped up banana.
For an extra health boost, add in two tablespoons strawberry/banana flavored flax oil. Blend until desired consistency is reached.

name: Fruit Yogurt Smoothie
directions: Freeze yogurt for approximately 1/2 hour, or until firm.
Blend "frozen yogurt", fruit and milk until smooth.
Add Instant Breakfast and honey and blend until completely combined.
Pour into large glass and enjoy.

name: Sweet Green Smoothie (Vita-Mix)
directions: Add ingredients in the order listed.
Start blender on Variable speed 1 and quickly turn it up to 10, then switch to High. Use plastic tamper to push ingredients into blades and blend for 1 minute.
Enjoy!

name: Tropical Peach Smoothie
directions: Mix all together and blend until smooth and creamy. Chill and serve.

name: Strawberry Colada Smoothie
directions: In blender container combine ingredients. Blend until smooth.
Serve in a frosted glass.

name: Banana Breakfast Smoothie
directions: Blend all the ingredients together and serve!

similar.name: Peanut Butter and Banana Breakfast Smoothie

name: Blueberry Banana Protein Smoothie
directions: Place water in blender then protein and rest of ingredients.
Blend on high then low until well blended.

name: Fruit Smoothie
directions: Add all ingredients into blender & blend until smooth.

name: Strawberry Banana Smoothie With Apple Cider
directions: Just blend everything together!  Add more or less of anything to get it to just the right consistency/taste.
I added chocolate syrup to the glass to make it look nice (doesn't change the taste really).
A good variation also is to add maple syrup instead of honey!

name: Smoothie in Paradise
directions: Allow your frozen fruit to only partially thaw.  (Transferring the needed amount from the freezer to the fridge the night before works great.).

Add pineapple, mango, banana, coconut, yogurt, orange juice, milk and honey to the blender, secure lid and blend on low or medium speed till everything is nice and smooth (should take no more than a minute).
Stop the blender and add 2 cups of ice.  Cover and blend till the ice has completley incorporated and everything is once again nice and smooth.
Have a taste/consistency test and, if a thicker consistency is desired, repeat the process with 1/2 cup more ice at a time.  If you get it too thick, just add a little more milk and/or orange juice.
Pour into glasses (I like them thick, so I usually have to sort of spoon it in!), sip through a straw, with eyes closed while you imagine white sand and turquoise water -- .

name: Pumpkin Pie Smoothie
directions: Combine the ingredients in a blender & puree until smooth!
Pour into 2 tall glasses & ENJOY!

name: Tropical Sunrise Smoothie
directions: Put all the ingredients in a blender & puree until smooth!
Pour into 2 tall glasses & ENJOY!

name: Mango Banana Smoothie
directions: Combine the ingredients in a blender & puree until smooth.
Pour into 2 glasses & ENJOY!

name: Guava Mango Papaya Smoothie
directions: Combine the ingredients in a blender & puree until smooth.
Pour into 2 tall glasses & ENJOY!

name: Peach Smoothie
directions: In a blender, combine ice, peaches, milk, yogurt and juice. Place lid on blender and select mix or crush setting. Blend until smooth; while machine is on, pour in honey and blend an additional 30 seconds.
Pour into glasses and serve.

similar.name: Peach and Ginger Green Tea Smoothie

name: Yogurt Breakfast Smoothie
directions: Add those ingredients, in order, into a blender.  The order prevents splashing and also helps things like the cinnamon to mix well.

Start blending on slow until it is all mixed.  Then blend on progressively higher speeds until you are blending on the fastest speed.  Blend on high for about a minute.  This aerates the smoothie and gives it a "fluffiness".
Pour into glass and enjoy!

name: Healthmaster Breakfast Smoothie
directions: Add ingredients one or two at a time, beginning with the water, to a HealthMaster or other high powered blender.  Blend until smooth.  May add two scoops of a protein powder if desired.
There is no need to peel or core any of the vegatables, with the exception of the sweet red pepper.  I don't even peel the kiwi.

name: Mango Lassi
directions: In a pitcher, combine the yogurt, milk, water, pulp, and sugar. Whisk briskly until completely mixed. Chill.
To serve, pour over crushed ice. Sprinkle the ground pistachios over the top.

name: Banana Smoothie
directions: Blend all together in blender and serve.

name: Berry Yoghurt Smoothie
directions: Mix the berries and yoghurt with a blender until smooth.
Drink immediately.
Serving suggestion: Freeze once made, and leave overnight. In the morning, place in a food processor until smooth. Add sugar or lemonade if desired. This makes a sorbet-like dessert.

name: Protein Packed Berry Smoothie
directions: In a blender, combine the entire container of yogurt and  splenda; mix well.

Add in the frozen blueberries and strawberries and place blender on the crush ice setting or a medium pulse setting until all the berries have been crushed. (if too thick to crush, you can add more milk to your liking).
Once crushed, change blender setting to "liquefy" setting until you reach your desired consistency -- again, add milk as you wish.

Ready to serve immediately as-is OR this does very well if made the evening before and placed in refrigerator with the top on the container.  It makes for a quick "morning rush" breakfast on-the-go.  Just add a cup or so of ice back into the container, crush again and then "liquify" for a minute or two.

Pour into cups, grab a straw and you are out the door!  My husband and I are drinking these almost every day of the week as we are driving in to our respective offices.  Healthy, tasty and packed with the protein you need to get you up and going for the day!

similar.name: Blueberry Strawberry Smoothie With Protein Powder

name: Peach  Perfection Smoothie
directions: Put all ingredients in a blender & puree until smooth.
Pour into a glass & ENJOY!

name: Mixed Fruit Smoothie
directions: Put ingredients into a blender & puree until smooth.
Pour into 2 glasses & ENJOY!

name: Tofu Fruit and Veggie Smoothie
directions: Pulse everything in a blender until smooth.
divide between two glasses and serve chilled.

name: Tropical Strawberry Delight Smoothie

Add frozen fruits.
Blend until smooth.

name: Strawberry Dream Smoothie
directions: Put all ingredients in blender and mix until smooth.

name: Banana Smoothie
directions: 1. Combine all ingredients in a blender.
2. Blend on low speed for about 5 seconds; turn speed to high and blend until you can't hear the ice cubes anymore (until they're blended in).
3. Pour into a glass and enjoy!
4. For an added treat, you could try adding a scoop of vanilla ice cream to make it a banana shake :).

name: Dewey's Simple Fruit Smoothie
directions: Combine all ingredients in blender on medium speed until smooth (about 2 minutes.) Adjust juice for a thicker or soupier smoothie to your preference. I normally funnel into 2 empty 16.9 oz. water bottles and chill in the freezer for approximately 30 minutes. Excellent on the go.

name: Wild Blueberry Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in blender and run until smooth.  Garnish with a few blueberries.  Add additional fruits and berries in season as desired.

name: Smoothie
directions: Blend in a blender.
Note: The recipe says try adding in things like honey, 4-6 ice cubes, or mineral water.

name: Honey Fruit Smoothie
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender and puree until well combined.

name: Good Morning Smoothie - Protein Drink
directions: Put all ingredients except ice in blender and blend until smooth.
Add ice and blend until frozen fruit smoothie consistency.

similar.name: Breakfast Peanut Butter and Banana Smoothie

name: Fruit Smoothies
directions: Place all ingredients in blender or food processor.
Blend until smooth.

name: Banana Berry Smoothies
directions: In a blender, combine all the ingredients in the order listed; cover and process for 30 seconds or until smooth. Stir if necessary.
Pour into chilled glasses; serve immediately.

name: Tropical Smoothie
directions: Put it all in the blender and puree.
Pour and serve.

name: Strawberry Raspberry Smoothie
directions: Add one cup of juice, strawberries, and raspberries into a blender.
Blend until most of the chunks are broken down, you will have to stop the blender and stir the contents to make sure all the big pieces get to the bottom.
Add the 2 yougurts and blend on liquify, slowly adding more juice/milk/water until the smoothie is the right consistancy for you.
If you add too much and it becomes watery, you can add more frozen berries and/or yogurt.
Adding the additional liquid is trial and error to determine which you prefer according to how sweet you like your smoothie. The juice will be the sweetest choice, then milk, then water.
Serve immediately.

name: Kids Berrynana Smoothie
directions: blend together and serve.

similar.name: Best Ever Banana and Berry Smoothies

name: Strawberry Banana Crunch Shake
directions: In a blender, blend together the yogurt, banana, and milk. I suggest that you put half of the banana first, then half of the yogurt, the other half of the banana, the rest of the yogurt, and then the milk.
After blending, drop in most of the Buncha Crunch's (leaving a bit for the top after) and blend again.
Garnish the shake with then remaining Buncha Crunch's.
Serve, Sip, and Smile [TM].

name: Strawberry Smoothie - Weight Watchers
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender in the order listed. Cover and blend on high speed until smooth.
Pour into two glasses and serve immediately.

name: Banana Breakfast Smoothie
directions: Place milk into jug.
Add all other ingredients.
Blend until smooth.

name: Tropical Smoothie
directions: Blend together and enjoy.

name: Chocolate Protein Smoothie
directions: Put all ingredients into a blender.  I use the smoothie button on mine, which is about 30 seconds.

name: Fruit Medley Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in blender and process until smooth.

name: Banana Coconut Breakfast Smoothie
directions: Using a Magic Bullet or blender, pour in crushed ice, then the coconut milk [you can substitute Lite Coconut Milk], then a peeled, sliced banana.
Blend to desired consistency.
Add psyllium husks [or flaxseeds or sunflower seeds] if desired for extra nutrition ~.
NOTE: you can substitute mango or mango puree or experiment with other fruits ~.

name: Gillian's Mixed Berry Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender and pulse blend until smooth.

name: Purple Passion Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in the blender and process until smooth.

name: Power Packed Purple Smoothie
directions: Add all ingredients to blender in the order listed (always start with liquids first when making smoothies).

Start the blender at a low speed to get the frozen fruits chopped then increase to high speed and let blend for 2 minutes.  If you have a blender like mine that only has pulse and on settings, start by pulsing a few times then turn on for 2 mintues.
Serve and enjoy!

name: Another Smoothie Recipe
directions: Put the yogurt & frozen berries into a blender.  I like to use Yoplait Light Berries & Cream with mostly frozen strawberries, but I'll put some blueberries and/or raspberries too if I have them in the freezer.
Begin blending the yogurt & berries.
Put a little bit of milk in the blender at a time (no need to measure), blending it as you go along, until the smoothie is the texture you like it.
Pour the drink in a glass & drink it.
Clean the blender later because you are running late for work! (is that just me?).

name: Banana Blueberry Orange Smoothie
directions: In a blender, combine milk, frozen fruit, yogurt and other flavourings (as called for); purée until smooth.
Pour into glasses; serve immediately.

name: Sweet Potato/Banana Smoothie
directions: Blend all ingredients well.
Freeze any portion you won't consume in the next day or two.
Serve warm or cold and ENJOY!

name: Strawberry Banana Smoothie
directions: Put ice cubes in blender, then add orange juice, bananas & strawberries. Blend till smooth.  If you find the mixture to be to thick, add more orange juice.  Feel free to substitute the strawberries with frozen mixed berries of any kind.

name: Fruit and Yogurt Protein Smoothie
directions: Dump in blender.
Mix.

name: Michelle's Mango Smoothie
directions: Place the mango nectar and yogurt in a blender.  Add the banana and mango chunks and blend until smooth.

name: Pineapple - Raspberry Smoothie
directions: Place everything in blender and blend until smooth and frothy.  Poor into glass and enjoy!

name: Banana and Kiwi Smoothie
directions: Chop the fruit roughly and put into your mixer bowl / container.
Add cream (optional), vanilla extract and honey.
Whizz up until smooth, but don't worry if there are still some lumps.
Add a little milk and whizz up until smooth.
Then add as much of the remaining milk as you want to suit your tastes.

name: Cantaloupe, Berry and Pineapple Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender & mix, using the on/off pulse function until mostly blended, then continue mixing, gradually increasing the speed, until the mixture is smooth.
Pour into 2 glasses & enjoy!

name: Strawberry, Blueberry and Banana Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender & ix by using the on/off pulse function until mostly blended, then continue mixing, gradually increasing the speed, until completely smooth.
Pour into 2 glasses & enjoy!

name: Apricot, Mango and Blueberry Smoothie
directions: Place ingredients in a blender & use the on/off pulse function to mix until mostly blended. Gradually increase the speed & continue mixing until smooth.
Pour into 2 glasses & enjoy!

name: Pineapple Raspberry Smoothie
directions: Place ingredients in a blender & blend until smooth.
Pour into 2 glasses & enjoy!

name: Tri-Berry Smoothie
directions: Remembering that SOME of the berries should be frozen (to give the smoothie some chilly frost!), place all ingredients in a blender & mix until smooth.
Pour into 2 glasses & enjoy!

name: Peachy Strawberry Smoothie
directions: Place ingredients in a blender & mix until smooth.
Pour into 2 glasses & enjoy!

name: Strawberry Cantaloupe Smoothie
directions: Place ingredients in a blender & mix until smooth.
Pour into 2 glasses & enjoy!

name: Strawberry Peach Soy Smoothie
directions: Place ingredients in a blender & mix until smooth.
Pour into 2 glasses & enjoy!

name: Cantaloupe, Peach and Pineapple Smoothie
directions: Place ingredients in a blender & mix by using the on/off pulse function until mostly blended, then gradually increase the speed & continue mixing until totally smooth.
Pour into 2 glasses & enjoy!

name: Berry and Mango Smoothie
directions: Place ingredients in blender & mix until smooth.
Pour into 2 glasses & enjoy!

name: Fruit and Veggie Smoothie
directions: Blend the apples with veggies until smooth. Add ice and ground cinnamon and serve cold.

name: Raspberry Lemon Smoothie
directions: Combine all the ingredients in a blender & process for about 30 seconds or until smooth.
Pour into 2 glasses & enjoy!

name: Raspberry Chocolate Smoothie
directions: Combine the berries, milk, yogurt & syrup in a blender & process until smooth, then (if using fresh berries) add the ice cubes & again process until smooth.
Pour into 2 glasses & enjoy!

name: Watermelon Strawberry Smoothie
directions: Combine watermelon, sorbet, banana (& ice, if using) in a blender & process until smooth.
Pour into 4 glasses & enjoy!

name: Blueberry Cherry Cheesecake Smoothie
directions: Combine berries, milk, cherries & cream cheese in a blender  process until smooth. Then, ONLY if fresh fruit was used, add 3 ice cubes & again process until smooth.
Pour into 2 glasses & enjoy!

name: Berry Protein Smoothie
directions: put all the ingredients in a blender. blend for about 30 -40 seconds on high. enjoy.

name: Papaya Perfection Smoothie
directions: Add almost all liquids, yogurt and frozen fruit to blender.  Let sit for at least 5 minutes to let fruit melt into liquid.
Blend ingredients on low for 90 seconds.
Add remaining liquid and banana and blend on low to high for an additional 90 seconds.

name: Fruity Smoothie
directions: Mix all ingredients in a blender until smooth.  Enjoy!

name: Green Smoothie
directions: Put all ingredients in blender and blend on high, adding water as needed to achieve a smooth consistency.
Feel free to adjust amounts and ingredients as desired.

name: Rich Mango Lassi
directions: Put HALF of all ingredients in a blender and blend till well mixed.
Scrape sides with a spatula if necessary.
Test for sweetness and thickness and add condensed milk/water to achieve the a sweeter and thinner drink if you prefer.
Repeat with the second half.

name: Elysian Strawberry Smoothie
directions: If you are using frozen fruit, you will probably want to thaw it a little (overnight in the fridge, or in the microwave for last-minute smoothie cravings!).
Dump it all in the food processor (blenders take soooo much more patient stirring - I, for one, have little use for them -- ) and blend.
Slowly pour in the soymilk. Keep blending until a uniform colour is achieved. Minus the flecks of kiwi seeds, of course.
Spoon into two big glasses, and enjoy your frosty treat!

name: Mango Lassi (India)
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender.
Process about 1 minute or until smooth.

name: Citrus Cream Smoothie
directions: In a small saucepan, bring the sugar and water to a boil over medium-high heat. Simmer, stirring occasionally, until the sugar has dissolved, about 5 minutes. Cool for 20 minutes.
Pour the cooled syrup into a blender. Add the yogurt, orange juice, bananas, orange zest, vanilla extract, and ice. Blend until the mixture is smooth. Pour into glasses and serve.

name: Chocolate Banana Smoothies
directions: In a blender, combine milk, pudding mix and vanilla; cover and process until blended. Add the bananas and ice; cover and process until smooth. Pour into chilled glasses; serve immediately.

name: Frozen Berry and Pineapple Smoothie
directions: Put berries, juices, yogurt (& sugar, if using) in a blender & process until smooth.
Pour into 2 tall glasses & ENJOY!

name: Mocha Java Smoothie
directions: In a small bowl, stir together the sugar, espresso powder and cocoa.  Add boiling water and stir until dissolved.  Combine the coffee mixture in the blender with the bananas, milk and ice and blend on high until smooth.
Can be partially combined in blender and refrigerated overnight.  In the morning, just add ice and bananas and blend.

name: 10 Second Mango Yogurt Smoothie
directions: Wizz together in blender adding more of either yogurt or mango nectar to taste.
If needed add your preferred version of sweetener but take into account an additional 5 seconds lol.
Pour into a tall glass & enjoy.

name: Lemon  Berry Smoothie
directions: Process in blender till smooth, enjoy!

name: Banana Blueberry Orange Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients into the Vita-Mix container in the order listed and secure lid.
Select Variable 1.
Turn machine on and quickly increase speed to Variable 10, then to High.
Blend for 1 minute or until desired consistency is reached.

name: Orange Bonus Smoothie
directions: Place everything in blender and blend until combined.
Enjoy!

name: Strawberry Banana Fruit Smoothie
directions: Add all ingredients to blender or smoothie maker at once.
Turn on high until no big chunks of ice remain.
If using a smoothie maker turn to low and dispense otherwise turn off blender and serve.

name: Berry Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients into blender and blend until smooth.
Serve immediately.

name: Green Smoothie
directions: Put water and greens in a blender and grind together.
Add frozen banana (broken in half), frozen berries, and coconut oil (if using).  Blend into a smooth, frozen drink.

name: Sunflower Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender and blend until smooth.  Taste, and adjust amounts.  Feel free to add a little honey or agave nectar if more sweetness is desired.

name: Coconut Fruit Shake (Smoothie)
directions: An easy way to measure the frozen fruit is to put in blender so that it reaches about two inches from the top.
Place all of ingredients in blender and blend until smooth.

name: Yogurt Fruit Smoothie
directions: Add all ingredients to your blend and blend until smooth.
Enjoy.

name: Fruit Smoothie - Mango
directions: Place the fruit and orange juice in a blender and process until smooth. Adjust the amount of juice to create the consistency you prefer.
For a frozen smoothie use frozen fruit or add a few ice cubes.
Serve in wineglasses with strawberry or mint for garnish.

name: Banana-Pineapple Breakfast Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in blender.
Cover; blend until smooth.
Pour into 4 serving glasses.
Garnish with pineapple slices, if desired.

name: Mango Smoothie
directions: Place mango, yogurt, and ice in a blender or food processor and blend or process.
If too thick, add a little milk.

name: Tropical Smoothie
directions: Combine all the ingredients into a blender and blend.
NOTE:  When freezing the banana, make sure you peel it first.  Then place it into a ziplock bag and place in freezer.

name: Banana Smoothie
directions: add ingredients to blender or food processor. blend until smooth, then pour into two chilled glasses.2.

name: Orange Creamsicle Smoothie
directions: Blend all ingredients together for 30 seconds and enjoy!

name: Chocolate Covered Strawberries Smoothie
directions: Blend all in a blender until well mixed and strawberries have been completely crushed. Pour into a glass and enjoy!
Note -- If using fresh strawberries, I would add ice for a chill factor!

name: Berry Smoothie
directions: Enter the liquid ingredients and powder into a blender. Mix for 20 seconds or until everything is well mixed.
Add ice and blend until all of the cubes are crushed and the mixture is smooth.
Finally, add the berries and blend for about 10 seconds or until the berries are mixed inches Don't blend too long or the berries will be liquefied.

name: Peachy  Cantaloupe Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in the blender in the order specified, and blend until smooth.
Pour into glasses and serve.

name: Morning Drink
directions: Wash items
Blend until desired consistency.

name: Tropical Tuesday Smoothie Shake
directions: Add all ingredients to blender and blend until smooth.

name: Strawberry Banana Smoothie
directions: blend everything in a blender and enjoy!

name: Easy, Healthy Fruit Smoothie!
directions: Put all ingredients in blender, except Agave or honey. Set blender on "ice crush" setting and blend until mixed.
Pour into cups, and add desired amount of honey or agave until sweetened.

similar.name: Quick ‘n Easy Strawberry and Banana Smoothie

name: Low Fat Yummy Fruit Smoothie
directions: Put all ingredients into a blender and blend until smooth.  Pour into a tall glass and enjoy.

name: Blueberry-Pineapple Smoothie
directions: In a blender combine all ingredients except the optional pineapple and/or blueberry topper.
Cover and blend until nearly smooth, stopping to scrape down sides of container as necessary.
Divide between two glasses.
Top with pineapple and/or blueberries.

name: Banana Chocolate Peanut Butter Smoothie
directions: Put all ingredients in a blender.
Blend until mixed.
Put cashews in if wanted.
Blend, but leave cashews chunky.
Pour into a glass.
Put cinnamon on top of the poured smoothie.

name: Banana Split Smoothie
directions: In a food processor, purée all ingredients at high speed until smooth.

name: Mango Coconut Bliss Smoothie
directions: Throw everything in the blender and puree until smooth and creamy. YUM!

name: The Caffeinated Banana Smoothie
directions: Put all in a blender and blend until smooth.

name: Orange Pineapple Banana Smoothie
directions: Place ingredients in blender in listed order.
Blend for about 30 seconds.
Drink immediately.
Important: use fresh sweet organic fruit.
Optional: You can add a couple ice cubes if you want it cold, but I prefer it room temperature - it feels very tropical and authentic that way.

name: Mango Smoothie
directions: Blend together until smooth.
Note:
Recipe adapted from "Clean: The Revolutionary Program To Restore the Body's Natural Ability To Heal Itself" (HarperOne; 2009).

name: Mango Lassi
directions: Combine all ingredients except ice in a blender and process until smooth, about 30 seconds.
Pour into tall glasses filled with ice and serve.

name: Coconut Smoothie
directions: The night before, pour coconut water into an ice cube tray and freeze until solid.
In a blender put: pineapple, yogurt, coconut sorbet, coconut milk, coconut water, fresh shaved coconut and 6 coconut ice cubes. Blend until smooth. Thin with more coconut water or milk, if desired.

name: Wild Berry Blast Smoothie
directions: Place smoothie pack, juice, yogurt, and milk in blender.
Blend until fruit is pureed and mixture is smooth.

name: Blueberry & Banana Smoothie
directions: In a blender, blend the orange juice and banana (using the "blend" or "smoothie" mode) until you get a consistent orange-banana juice.

With the blender still going, use the hole in the lid and slowly add the blueberries to the juice.  Slow is important - if you go too fast, you get  frozen-fruit suspended above the blades and have to stop the thing to shove all the fruit to the bottom so that the blades catch it.

You'll know when to stop blending when the smoothie has turned a beautiful shade of deep-purple and it has a thick, jamba-juice-smoothie-like consistency.  If you have blueberry-banana juice, with a layer of gelatinous fruit on top,  you've blended it for too long.

I’ve also added, an avocado, strawberries, oranges or organic apples in place of the blueberries or if I don’t have enough blueberries—just to make enough to fill up the rest of the  containers. Blend on medium for 2 mins or until the pulp has completely mixed with the yoghurt.
Serve in chilled glasses with a light drizzle of cardamom on top.

name: Mango Lassi
directions: Place all the ingredients in a blender.
Blend on medium for 2 mins or until the pulp has completely mixed with the yoghurt.
Serve in chilled glasses with a light drizzle of cardamom on top.

name: Pear and Orange Yogurt Smoothie
directions: Dice the pears into 1 inch pieces, put in blender with orange slices, honey and mint leaves (with stalks). Pour in the yogurt.
Blend in blender.
Garnish with a few mint leaves.

name: Strawberry Banana Smoothie
directions: Place all the ingredients into the blender.
Blend until the mixture is smooth.
Serve immediately.

name: Triple Berry Smoothie With Yogurt
directions: Add the berries, bananas, yogurt, milk and honey to a blender and puree until smooth.
Pour into glasses and serve immediately.

name: Strawberry Oatmeal Smoothie
directions: Put all ingredients in a blender and blend until smooth.
Adjust sweetness to taste.

name: Berry Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender.
Blend until there is a smooth consistency.

name: Fresh Pineapple-Mango Smoothie
directions: combine the pineapple, mango and juice in a blender.
add the yogurt and cinnamon to the blender.
fill 4 tall drinking glasses with ice cubes.
pour the smoothie over the ice, garnish each glass with a strawberry (if using) and serve.

name: Green Like Me Smoothie
directions: use your hands to tear the kale, spinach, or other greens into smaller pieces.
combine the greens, avocado, banana, and gingerroot(if using) in a blender. whirl on high speed until smooth, about 1 minute.
pour the apple juice and water into the blender.
cover the blender and puree until very smooth, scrapping down the side of the container with a rubber spatula and adding more water if necessary for a thinner consistency.
fill tall drinking glasses with ice and add a straw if you like.
pour the smoothie over the ice.

name: Strawberry Banana Blueberry Smoothie
directions: Put all ingredients in the blender.
Blend for about 30 seconds to a minute.
If you don't like bananas you can either put less banana or add more blueberries and strawberries instead.

name: Berry Smoothie
directions: Place into blender.
Blend until smooth.  Add ice to chill.

name: Strawberry Banana Smoothie
directions: place all ingredients in the blender.
AND BLEND THEMMMM.

name: Peach and Strawberry Smoothie
directions: Combine peaches, strawberries, banana, juice, yogurt and honey in a blender and purée until smooth.
Serve and enjoy.

name: Healthy Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients into blender.
Blend until smooth.

name: Spinach and Strawberry Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients into blender, blend until smooth and enjoy!
Place all ingredients into blender, blend until smooth and enjoy!

name: Blueberry Delight
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender and process until smooth.
Pour into glasses and serve immediately.

name: Banana Berry Smoothie
directions: Grate the ginger, peel and chop the banana then chop and de-stem the strawberries.
Place in a blender along with the rest of the ingredients and blitz until smooth and creamy.

name: Sunrise Smoothie
directions: Blend carrots and 160ml/5.5fl oz orange juice in a blender until smooth. Pour into serving glass.
Blend mango, yoghurt, and remaining orange juice in a blender. Pour over a spoon set over the carrot layer inside the glass to keep distinct layers.
Serve optionally with honey or maple syrup.

name: Fresh Fruit Smoothie
directions: Blend all ingredients together.
Enjoy.

name: Fruit Smoothie
directions: Add the strawberries, pineapple, milk, baby spinach, yogurt, bananas, avocado and ice to a blender and blend until smooth, thick and creamy.
Pour into 4 glasses and garnish with sliced strawberries.

name: Strawberry Peach Smoothies
directions: Process banana, honey, and salt in blender until smooth, about 10 seconds. Add strawberries, peaches, yogurt and orange juice and blend until smooth, scraping down sides of blender as necessary, about 1 minute. .
Serve.

name: Berry Fusion Smoothie
directions: Combine all ingredients together and blend until smooth. Add more milk to thin it up if needed.
It makes 2 servings.
